// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ■ TIMER REGISTRY — prevents memory leaks
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const _timerIds    = { timeouts: [], intervals: [] };

function cafTimeout(fn, delay) {
  const id = setTimeout(() => {
    try { fn(); } finally {
      const i = _timerIds.timeouts.indexOf(id);
      if (i !== -1) _timerIds.timeouts.splice(i, 1);
    }
  }, delay);
  _timerIds.timeouts.push(id);
  return id;
}

function cafInterval(fn, delay) {
  const id = setInterval(fn, delay);
  _timerIds.intervals.push(id);
  return id;
}

function clearAllTimers() {
  _timerIds.timeouts.forEach(clearTimeout);
  _timerIds.intervals.forEach(clearInterval);
  _timerIds.timeouts.length  = 0;
  _timerIds.intervals.length = 0;
}

window.addEventListener('beforeunload', clearAllTimers);

// Code Academy Pro — main script (refactored to namespace pattern)

const CodeAcademyApp = (() => {
  "use strict";



// ═══ PRELOADER ═══
// (moved outside IIFE — see bottom of file)

// ═══ PARTICLES ═══
(function() {
  const bg = document.getElementById("particles-bg");
  for (let i = 0; i < 40; i++) {
    const p = document.createElement("div");
    p.className = "particle";
    p.style.cssText = `left:${Math.random()*100}%;width:${Math.random()*4+2}px;height:${Math.random()*4+2}px;animation-duration:${Math.random()*15+10}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*10}s;opacity:${Math.random()*0.4}`;
    bg.appendChild(p);
  }
})();

// ═══ NAVBAR ═══
window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
  document.getElementById("navbar").classList.toggle("scrolled", window.scrollY > 50);
  document.getElementById("scrollTop").classList.toggle("visible", window.scrollY > 400);
  updateActiveNav();
});
document.getElementById("hamburger").addEventListener("click", () => {
  document.getElementById("navLinks").classList.toggle("open");
});
function updateActiveNav() {
  document.querySelectorAll("section[id]").forEach(sec => {
    const top = sec.offsetTop - 120, id = sec.getAttribute("id");
    if (window.scrollY >= top && window.scrollY < top + sec.offsetHeight) {
      document.querySelectorAll(".nav-link").forEach(l => l.classList.remove("active"));
      document.querySelector(`.nav-link[href="#${id}"]`)?.classList.add("active");
    }
  });
}
function scrollToSection(id) {
  document.getElementById(id)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
  document.getElementById("navLinks").classList.remove("open");
}

// ═══ THEME ═══
let isDark = true;
document.getElementById("themeToggle").addEventListener("click", () => {
  isDark = !isDark;
  document.body.classList.toggle("light-mode", !isDark);
  document.getElementById("themeToggle").innerHTML = isDark ? '' : '';
});

// ═══ HERO TYPING ═══
const codeLines = [
  'def greet(name):',
  '    """مرحبا في عالم البرمجة"""',
  '    return f"أهلاً {name}!"',
  '',
  '# ابدأ رحلتك اليوم',
  'student = "طالب البرمجة"',
  'print(greet(student))',
  '',
  '# الناتج:',
  '➜ أهلاً طالب البرمجة!'
];
let lineIdx = 0, charIdx = 0;
const codeEl = document.getElementById("typingCode");
function typeCode() {
  if (lineIdx >= codeLines.length) { cafTimeout(() => { codeEl.innerHTML = ""; lineIdx = 0; charIdx = 0; typeCode(); }, 3000); return; }
  const line = codeLines[lineIdx];
  const stripped = line.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, "");
  if (charIdx <= stripped.length) {
    let display = codeLines.slice(0, lineIdx).join("
") + (lineIdx > 0 ? "
" : "");
    display += line.substring(0, getHtmlLen(line, charIdx));
    codeEl.innerHTML = display + '|';
    charIdx++;
    cafTimeout(typeCode, 45);
  } else { lineIdx++; charIdx = 0; cafTimeout(typeCode, 200); }
}
function getHtmlLen(html, tLen) {
  let tl = 0, i = 0;
  while (i < html.length && tl < tLen) { if (html[i] === "<") { while (i < html.length && html[i] !== ">") i++; } else { tl++; } i++; }
  return i;
}
cafTimeout(typeCode, 2500);

// ═══ COUNTERS ═══
let countersAnimated = false;
function animateCounters() {
  if (countersAnimated) return;
  countersAnimated = true;
  document.querySelectorAll(".stat-num, .count").forEach(el => {
    const target = +el.dataset.target, duration = 2000;
    const step = target / (duration / 16);
    let current = 0;
    const timer = cafInterval(() => {
      current += step;
      if (current >= target) { current = target; clearInterval(timer); }
      el.textContent = Math.floor(current).toLocaleString();
    }, 16);
  });
}

// ═══ SCROLL ANIMATIONS ═══
function initScrollAnimations() {
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.classList.add("visible");
        if (e.target.closest(".stats-section")) animateCounters();
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  document.querySelectorAll(".fade-up").forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
}

// ═══ COURSES FILTER ═══
document.querySelectorAll(".filter-btn").forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
    document.querySelectorAll(".filter-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
    btn.classList.add("active");
    const f = btn.dataset.filter;
    document.querySelectorAll(".course-card").forEach(c => c.classList.toggle("hidden", f !== "all" && c.dataset.cat !== f));
  });
});

function showLessons(lang, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll(".lesson-tab").forEach(t => t.classList.remove("active"));
  btn.classList.add("active");
  const grid = document.getElementById("lessonsGrid");
  grid.innerHTML = lessonsData[lang].map(l => `
    

      
${l.num}

      

        
${l.title}

        

          ${l.free ? 'مجاني' : ''}
           ${l.dur}
        

      

      
    

  `).join("");
}
showLessons("html", document.querySelector(".lesson-tab"));

// ═══ CODE EDITOR ═══
const defaultCode = {
  html: `\n\n\n  \n  صفحتي الأولى\n  \n\n\n  
\n    
🚀 مرحباً بالمبرمج!
\n    
هذه هي صفحتك الأولى بالـ HTML والـ CSS
\n    \n  
\n\n`,
  css: `/* ✨ تأثيرات CSS إبداعية */\nbody {\n  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;\n  background: #0a0a1a;\n  display: flex; align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; margin: 0;\n  flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;\n}\n.box {\n  width: 120px; height: 120px;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6c63ff, #00d4ff);\n  border-radius: 20px;\n  animation: spin 3s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n@keyframes spin {\n  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); border-radius: 20px; }\n  50%  { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.2); border-radius: 50%; }\n  100% { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(1); border-radius: 20px; }\n}\n.text { color: white; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: bold; }`,
  js: `// 🚀 JavaScript التفاعلي\nconsole.log("مرحباً بعالم JavaScript!");\n\n// Array Methods الحديثة\nconst students = [\n  { name: "أحمد",   grade: 92 },\n  { name: "فاطمة", grade: 88 },\n  { name: "محمد",  grade: 95 },\n  { name: "سارة",  grade: 79 },\n];\n\nconst avg = students.reduce((s, x) => s + x.grade, 0) / students.length;\nconst top = students.filter(s => s.grade >= 90).map(s => s.name);\n\nconsole.log("المتوسط:", avg.toFixed(1));\nconsole.log("المتفوقون:", top.join(", "));\n\n// Destructuring + Spread\nconst [first, ...rest] = students.sort((a,b) => b.grade - a.grade);\nconsole.log("المركز الأول:", first.name, "بدرجة", first.grade);\n\n// Template Literals\nstudents.forEach(s => console.log(\`📚 \${s.name}: \${s.grade}\`));`,
  python: `# 🐍 Python الاحترافي\n\n# List Comprehensions\nnumbers = list(range(1, 21))\nprimes = [n for n in numbers if n > 1 and all(n % i != 0 for i in range(2, n))]\nprint("الأعداد الأولية:", primes)\n\n# Dictionary & Classes\nclass Student:\n    def __init__(self, name, grade):\n        self.name = name\n        self.grade = grade\n\n    @property\n    def status(self):\n        return "ممتاز" if self.grade >= 90 else "جيد جداً" if self.grade >= 80 else "جيد"\n\n    def __repr__(self):\n        return f"{self.name} ({self.grade}) — {self.status}"\n\nstudents = [Student("أحمد", 92), Student("فاطمة", 88), Student("محمد", 75)]\nfor s in sorted(students, key=lambda x: -x.grade):\n    print(s)`
};
const filenames = { html:"index.html", css:"style.css", js:"script.js", python:"main.py" };
let currentLang = "html";
const editor = document.getElementById("codeEditor");
editor.value = defaultCode.html;
updateLines();

function updateLines() {
  const lines = editor.value.split("\n").length;
  document.getElementById("lineNumbers").innerHTML = Array.from({length:lines},(_,i)=>i+1).join("
");
}

function setLang(lang) {
  currentLang = lang;
  editor.value = defaultCode[lang];
  document.getElementById("editorFilename").textContent = filenames[lang];
  document.querySelectorAll(".lang-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.toggle("active", b.dataset.lang === lang));
  document.getElementById("consoleOutput").textContent = "";
  updateLines();
  if (lang !== "python") runCode();
  else document.getElementById("outputFrame").srcdoc = `

    
🐍 Python Code Ready

    
Python يعمل على الخادم — لتشغيل الكود استخدم:

    

    
• Replit.com

    
• Google Colab

    
• Online Python

  
`;
}

function runCode() {
  try {
  const code = editor.value;
  document.getElementById("consoleOutput").textContent = '▶ جارٍ التشغيل...';
  if (currentLang === "html") {
    document.getElementById("outputFrame").srcdoc = code;
  } else if (currentLang === "css") {
    document.getElementById("outputFrame").srcdoc = `
CSS ✨
`;
  } else if (currentLang === "js") {
    document.getElementById("outputFrame").srcdoc = `
